visual_summary: An elevated third-floor Martian apartment serving as a functional living space. The interior is cluttered with martial trophies, including silks, furs, and weapons. The quarters occupy a high vantage point that overlooks a bustling, overgrown central courtyard.
layout_notes: Elevated urban dwelling; large central courtyard anchor; trophy-laden interior.
constraints: Must maintain high vantage point overlooking the courtyard
Interior must reflect a mix of functional living and trophy collection
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural layout of the third-floor unit is not detailed.
Exact nature of the "communal" aspect (presence of retinues vs. shared space) remains partially undefined.
